model.command_line: streme --verbosity 1 --oc xstreme_out/streme_out -rna --minw 6 --maxw 15 --order 2 --bfile xstreme_out/background --seed 0 --align right --evalue --thresh 0.05 --p /Users/ronaldcutler/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop-unique/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/motif_enrichment/1-extract-seq/log2fc_greaterthan_5_padj_lessthan_0p05.fasta --n /Users/ronaldcutler/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop-unique/batch-2-arc-rep1-removed/motif_enrichment/1-extract-seq/log2fc_lessthan_0.fasta
